goal: Ship the remaining docs/status non-GA backlog: reconcile docs/status/architecture-todo.md and docs/status/ui-todo.md with main (release-todo now has only GA §1 as code gate; Beta/soft/polish rows are closed in repo), eliminate stale duplicated open narratives (especially auth/password/terms and status-docs-followup overlap), tighten immediate vs later workstreams with file-evidence citations, and apply AGENTS.md backlog hygiene (product-done.md one-liners when rows are struck or materially closed).
summary: Final sweep of docs/status roadmap todos so they match main and GA-only release posture—all models on composer-2-fast.
acceptanceCriteria: architecture-todo.md and ui-todo.md contain no contradictory claims vs docs/status/release-todo.md (GA §1 remains the only numbered code gate)
Stale bullets that imply shipped auth/password/terms UX is still open are corrected
AGENTS backlog hygiene satisfied for any backlog rows removed or materially closed
Independent verifier signs off with repo-only evidence

tasks.name: reconcile-status-roadmap-docs
tasks.scopedGoal: Reconcile architecture-todo.md and ui-todo.md against the repo and release-todo.md so the non-GA docs backlog is truthful: fix stale duplicated open items, align dates/groupings, update product-done.md per AGENTS when striking or closing doc-tracked slices.
tasks.brief:
**Context (do not rediscover—the planner verified):** release-todo.md (2026-05-10) closes non-GA §2–§7 and polish through §16e; only GA Blocker §1 stays open as code gate. architecture-todo.md and ui-todo.md (2026-05-11) already claim reconciliation but still enumerate Phase 2.7/auth follow-ups that overlap shipped register password-strength + terms (see ui-todo §1.2 item 11). Prior orchestrate workspace status-docs-followup-20ad completed audit + implementation handoffs.

**Do:** Edit only under docs/status/** unless you must fix a broken path reference (prefer doc edits). Sweep architecture-todo and ui-todo for: (1) bullets that say work is outstanding when codebase already ships it—mark complete in-place with concise evidence pointers or tighten wording; (2) duplicate contradictory open-backlog narratives; (3) any remaining branch-name-only claims that contradict main.

**AGENTS.md:** Removing or materially closing backlog entries requires product-done.md one-liners in the matching table.
acceptance: No doc claims auth register password-strength or terms linkage is missing if src already implements them—update ui-todo/architecture framing accordingly
Open backlog groupings distinguish GA §1-adjacent vs product UX vs later phases without contradicting release-todo
product-done.md gains rows for each doc slice struck/closed under AGENTS hygiene rules
tasks.verify: Use rg/cat on cited paths to sanity-check assertions in the edited docs match the codebase; record commands + paths in handoff.

tasks.name: verify-reconciled-status-roadmap-docs
tasks.scopedGoal: Independently verify docs/status architecture-todo.md, ui-todo.md, product-done.md, and release-todo.md are mutually consistent after the reconciliation worker.
tasks.brief: Re-read the four docs. Fail if stale open narratives remain versus code evidence (spot-check register/terms/password-strength surfaces), if release-tier claims contradict release-todo, or if AGENTS-required product-done closures are missing for struck rows.
acceptance: Verifier passes only when doc set is internally consistent and AGENTS backlog hygiene holds
Explicit fail message lists any contradictory sections with file headings
